flags.description: Adjust Home Manager modules so laptop host does not install Aseprite or JetBrains Rider.
Ensure Kilo Code and Kiro tooling modules are installed and available on laptop Home Manager configuration.

flags.decision: [Kept module import ordering and added only missing kilo module; kiro module was already imported and unchanged.]
flags.done: ["Updated development module aggregator to import kilo-code.nix so the kilo command is provisioned through Home Manager, including on laptop."]
flags.remaining: [Apply configuration on laptop and verify kilo and kiro commands are present in PATH.]
flags.uncertain: ["If kiro still appears unavailable after rebuild, need runtime install logs from home activation to diagnose installer failures."]

flags.decision: [Kept agent-browser as an `npx` wrapper but made its runtime self-contained via Nix by pinning Node.js and Playwright paths/environment variables in the module instead of relying on a separate install step.]
flags.done: ["Updated `modules/home/development/agent-browser.nix` so agent-browser is wrapped with Nix-provided Node.js, the Playwright driver/browser bundle is included in `home.packages`, and Playwright environment variables are exported from Home Manager. Built `.#nixosConfigurations.laptop.config.system.build.toplevel` successfully to validate the change."]
flags.remaining: [Apply the updated laptop configuration with `sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake . --impure` on the target machine and verify `agent-browser open https://example.com` works there.]
flags.uncertain: ["If agent-browser later requires additional Linux runtime libraries beyond what `pkgs.playwright-driver` already provides, those would need to be added after testing on the actual laptop session."]

flags.description: Update ignore rules so `.todos/` and `.sidecar/` are committed in the repository instead of ignored.

flags.decision: ["Used ignore-rule exceptions so `.todos` database files override the existing generic `*.db` ignore patterns, while leaving unrelated local/runtime directories ignored."]
flags.done: ["Updated `.gitignore` so `.todos/` and `.sidecar/` are no longer ignored, and committed the tracked TD workspace snapshot in `bb34554` (`chore: track TD workspace state`). Verified `.sidecar/shells.json.lock` was already tracked in git."]
flags.remaining: ["If a perfectly clean working tree is desired, refresh and commit the live `.todos` database snapshot again after TD writes settle; `.todos/issues.db-wal` changed again during task bookkeeping."]
flags.uncertain: ["`.todos` is an actively mutating TD SQLite workspace, so it may continue to appear modified whenever TD commands run during future sessions."]
